news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因新去中心化交易所交易量增长。数据来源DeFiLlama。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by growing trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG published the Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, enhancing smart contract expressiveness and reducing fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink's Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币开发者拟推ZK-Rollup二层方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation research group drafts a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
